summary: Backend refactoring validation complete - All 24 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified working with login, dashboard, jobs, clients, stones, and shipments pages all rendering correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET / - Root endpoint returns version info
Backend: GET /health - Health check returns healthy status
Backend: POST /auth/login - Admin login (admin@bashari.com/admin123) successful
Backend: POST /auth/login - Customer login (customer@test.com/customer123) successful
Backend: POST /auth/login - Invalid credentials correctly rejected (401)
Backend: GET /auth/me - Returns current user info with valid token
Backend: GET /branches - Returns 2+ branches
Backend: GET /clients - Returns 93 clients
Backend: GET /jobs - Returns 12 jobs
Backend: GET /jobs/{job_id} - Returns job with stones array
Backend: GET /stones - Returns 24 stones
Backend: GET /shipments - Returns 8 shipments
Backend: GET /shipments/config/options - Returns shipment types and couriers
Backend: GET /dashboard/stats - Returns stats (12 jobs, 93 clients, 24 stones)
Backend: GET /pricing - Returns brackets and color_stability_fee
Backend: GET /settings/dropdowns - Returns dropdown settings
Backend: GET /users - Returns admin users
Backend: GET /addresses - Returns addresses
Backend: GET /cloudinary/signature - Returns signature with cloud_name
Backend: GET /jobs/{job_id}/pdf/memo-in - Returns PDF (200 status)
Backend: GET /jobs/{job_id}/pdf/invoice - Returns PDF (200 status)
Backend: GET /jobs/{job_id}/notifications/status - Returns notification types
Backend: Customer role access - Customer sees only their own jobs
Backend: Customer role access - Customer cannot see all clients
Frontend: Login page loads with proper form
Frontend: Admin login redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows correct stats (12 jobs, 93 clients, $4.5M value)
Frontend: Jobs page renders 12 jobs with all columns
Frontend: Clients page renders 93 clients with all columns
Frontend: Stones page renders 24 stones with all columns
Frontend: Shipments page renders 8 shipments with all columns
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring from monolithic 3815-line server.py to 18 modular router files completed successfully
All API routes maintained same paths after refactoring
Router pattern properly implemented with APIRouter prefix handling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend was refactored from monolithic server.py (3815 lines) into 18 modular router files. All 24 API tests pass. Frontend login, dashboard, jobs, clients, stones, and shipments pages all working correctly. Data counts verified: 12 jobs, 93 clients, 24 stones, 8 shipments. Customer role access restrictions working properly.
